name: cxxmcp-sdk
description: C++ MCP SDK for protocol, client, server, transport, peer, and handler APIs.

http.description: HTTP transport via cpp-httplib. Combine with openssl for HTTPS.

websocket.description: WebSocket transport via cpp-httplib. Combine with openssl for WSS.

auth.description: Build the optional OAuth 2.1 / DPoP auth scaffold target.

openssl.description: Enable OpenSSL-backed HTTP/WebSocket TLS and auth crypto when auth is selected.
